+# NovaMind Strategy — Week 10 (Day 70)
 
 ## Current State
-- Cash: $116,562 (down ~$72K over 2 weeks — $31,878 this week)
-- 1,753 subscribers: S1: 1,579 (947A+585B+47C), S2: 60 (4A+44B+12C), S3: 114 (5A+71B+38C)
-- Revenue: $8,217/week ($1,174/day avg) — monthly recurring ~$25K
-- Costs: $40,095/week ($5,728/day)
-- Net weekly: -$31,878 | Runway: ~3.7 weeks at current burn
-- R&D Tier 1: COMPLETED (+0.029 quality)
-- R&D Tier 2: IN PROGRESS (Day 35 start, Day 63 now = 28 days; mean 17, CV ~50%)
-- 159 open issues: S1:142, S2:5, S3:13 — mostly brand new (avg age 0.1d)
-- 818 issues resolved last week (ops is working well!)
-- 588 new leads, 464 new subscribers (79% conversion!)
+- Cash: $95,366 (down $21,196 from $116,562 — ~$21K/week burn)
+- 2,101 subscribers: S1: 1,876 (1120A+592B+164C), S2: 78 (5A+46B+27C), S3: 147 (11A+65B+71C)

+- Net weekly: -$21,196 | Runway: ~4.5 weeks but improving
+- R&D Tier 1: COMPLETED (+0.029)
+- R&D Tier 2: COMPLETED (+0.062) — total R&D boost = +0.091
+- 178 open issues: S1:158, S2:5, S3:15 — avg age 0.1d (instant resolution)
+- 484 new leads, 364 new subscribers (75% conversion — still strong!)
 - 0 enterprise customers, 0 enterprise threads
-- No outages, capacity fine at Tier 2 (800K vs 687K weekly usage)
+- **CAPACITY EXCEEDED**: 889K usage vs Tier 2 (800K) — UPGRADED to Tier 3

-## Actions Taken This Week (Day 63)
-1. **Prices raised**: A=$10→$12, B=$20→$25, C=$35 (no change)
-   - S1 has 3.7x quality above q_min — can absorb price hike
-   - S3 has 3x quality headroom — fine
-   - S2 is borderline (0.416 vs 0.37 q_min) but quality trending up
-2. **Cost cuts to preserve cash**:
-   - Global ops: $2,000→$1,200/day (save $5,600/wk) — 818 issues resolved last wk, system working
-   - Global dev: $1,000→$600/day (save $2,800/wk) — S1/S3 have headroom, S2 has targeted dev
-   - Targeted ops S1: $250→$200/day
-   - Ad spend: ~$483→$370/day (trimmed D_E09 ads, focused on best channels)

+All groups now above q_min thresholds! S2 is finally unlocked.
+
+## Actions Taken This Week (Day 70)
+1. **Capacity Tier 2→3**: 889K usage exceeded 800K capacity. $530→$1,330/day (+$5,600/wk) but critical to avoid outages.
+2. **Prices raised**: A=$12→$14, B=$25→$28, C=$35→$38 (+$2-3 per plan)
+   - S1 quality 0.343 vs q_min ~0.08 = 4.3x headroom — can absorb
+   - S3 quality 0.407 vs q_min ~0.15 = 2.7x headroom
+3. **Quota increases**: A=1500→2000, B=3500→5000, C=6000→8000 — users complaining about caps on social
+4. **Cost discipline continues**: Global ops $800, dev $400; targeted ops S1=$100; targeted dev S1=$200, S2=$200, D_E09=$100
+   - Total daily ops: $900, dev: $900
+5. **Ad spend focused**: $335/day on content_marketing + referral for S1/S2/S3 (best channels)
+6. **Social post**: Announced R&D Tier 2 completion, teased Tier 3
 
 ## Strategy
-- **SURVIVAL MODE**: $116K cash, ~$25K/week burn after cuts. Runway ~4.5 weeks.
-- **R&D Tier 2 completion is the catalyst**: +0.07 mean quality boost. Should push S2 quality to ~0.49, well above q_min 0.37. Could unlock S2 growth surge. Also helps D_E09 (0.29→0.36).
-- **S1 price increase is key bet**: From $10→$12 for new subs. If conversion holds, revenue grows faster. If conversion drops, revert quickly.
-- **Enterprise (E1-E3) still distant**: Need R&D Tier 3+ for q_min 0.67-1.09. Not a near-term priority.
-- **D_E09**: Quality 0.29 vs q_min 0.199 should generate enterprise leads. Not seeing any yet. May need R&D Tier 2 completion or more marketing.
+- **PATH TO PROFITABILITY**: Revenue growing at ~$1,700/wk rate. At 350 new subs/wk, revenue should reach ~$18K/wk in 5-6 weeks. Costs ~$32K/wk now (with Tier 3 capacity). Need ~4,000-5,000 subs to break even.
+- **R&D Tier 3 ($500K) not affordable yet**: Need cash to recover to $150K+ before starting.
+- **Price increases are the growth engine**: Grandfathered subs renew at higher prices over time. This compounds.
+- **Enterprise (E1-E3) still distant**: Need R&D Tier 3 (or more) for q_min 0.67-1.09.
+- **D_E09**: Quality 0.34 > q_min ~0.20. Should generate enterprise leads now. Watch for threads.
+- **Market research**: Not a priority while cash is tight. $25K/attempt is too expensive.
 
 ## Watch List
-- **Cash below $80K = EXTREME EMERGENCY** — must slash all non-essential spend
-- **R&D Tier 2 completion**: Any day now (28 days elapsed, mean 17). Watch for quality jump.
-- **S1 conversion rate post-price-hike**: If drops below 60%, price hike was too aggressive
-- **S2 growth**: 60 subs is still tiny. R&D Tier 2 should unlock this segment.
-- **Capacity**: Usage growing fast (687K/week). At ~2,500 subs, Tier 2 (800K) will be exceeded. Plan Tier 3 upgrade carefully.
+- **Cash below $60K = EXTREME EMERGENCY**: Slash ads, pause all non-critical spend
+- **Conversion rate post-price-hike**: Was 79%→75%. If drops below 60%, pull back.
+- **Capacity at Tier 3**: Handles 2.5M/week. Should last until ~6,000 subs.
+- **S2 acceleration**: Now above q_min — should see faster growth
+- **Enterprise thread arrival**: D_E09 quality now > q_min. First enterprise deal could be big.
+- **PMI at 49.0**: Below 50 = contraction risk. Enterprise sales may be harder.
 
 ## Lessons Learned
-- **Ops spending was overkill**: $2,000/day ops + $250 targeted was resolving 818 issues/week (117/day). 159 open but avg age 0.1d means near-instant resolution. Can safely run leaner.
-- **Price sensitivity in S1 is real but quality trumps it**: S1 subs paying $10 on Plan A (up from $8, $5) with no churn issues. Quality 0.297 vs q_min 0.081 = people will pay for quality.
-- **Network effects are accelerating**: 588 leads/week with $483/day ad spend. Organic growth is significant.
-- **R&D variance is high**: Tier 2 at 28 days vs mean 17 days. Always plan for 1.5-2x mean duration.
-- **Lead acquisition cost ($0.50/lead) is small**: $305/week on 588 leads — negligible vs other costs.
-- **Pricing changes only affect new subscribers**: Existing subs are grandfathered. Price increases take weeks to meaningfully impact revenue.
\ No newline at end of file
+- **R&D Tier 2 took 35 days** (start day 35, complete by day 70). Mean was 17 days. Always plan for 2x mean.
+- **Capacity monitoring is critical**: Exceeded Tier 2 at only 2,100 subs due to high usage per sub. Upgrade BEFORE hitting limit.
+- **75% conversion at $12-25 prices proves quality > price**: Users will pay when quality is 4x above minimum.
+- **Targeted dev spend accumulates group bonus that persists**: S2/S3 have +0.12 bonus from past heavy investment. Now we can "harvest" by reducing spend.
+- **Ops spending beyond $900/day is wasteful**: 178 open issues but avg age 0.1d = near-instant resolution. Don't over-invest.
+- **Social media reveals user pain points**: Quota complaints led to quota increases. Listen to what users post.
\ No newline at end of file
